candidates.name: SigNoz/signoz

why_liked.claim: Observability product repo with many CI workflows and release automation
Publishes an OpenAPI spec as a tracked artifact

patterns: P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
P-008 Release automation and versioned artifacts
avoid: Large multi-language codebase; extract workflow patterns, not implementation details

candidates.name: langfuse/langfuse

why_liked.claim: LLM observability/eval oriented repo with CI-heavy posture
Stores small trace-like fixtures as versioned JSON files

patterns: P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
P-009 Deterministic fixtures for eval and traces
avoid: App-level architecture; map concepts to ISA boundaries rather than copying folder layout

candidates.name: Helicone/helicone

why_liked.claim: CI is decomposed into targeted workflows (typecheck, migrations, e2e)
Explicit typed client boundary surface present

patterns: P-003 Typed API boundary with tRPC + Zod
P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
avoid: Product-specific infra; focus on CI and boundary patterns

candidates.name: colinhacks/zod

why_liked.claim: Canonical TS-first schema validation and parsing library
Core schema code and tests are maintained under packages

patterns: P-003 Typed API boundary with tRPC + Zod
avoid: Library repo; use as boundary-validation reference, not as app architecture reference

candidates.name: trpc/trpc

why_liked.claim: Client link patterns include retries and dedupe
End-to-end typesafe RPC boundary for TS apps

patterns: P-003 Typed API boundary with tRPC + Zod
avoid: Router patterns are framework-specific; map to ISA tRPC layer where appropriate

candidates.name: drizzle-team/drizzle-orm

why_liked.claim: Tracing hooks exist in the core library
Type-driven DB layer with explicit adapters

patterns: P-003 Typed API boundary with tRPC + Zod
P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
avoid: Multi-package monorepo; keep ISA DB boundary simple

candidates.name: semantic-release/semantic-release

why_liked.claim: Automates releases driven by commit history and conventions
CI workflow dedicated to release automation

patterns: P-008 Release automation and versioned artifacts
avoid: Release automation requires consistent commit discipline

candidates.name: ajv-validator/ajv

why_liked.claim: Benchmarks and docs exist as first-class folders
Canonical JSON Schema validator for JS/TS

avoid: Library repo; apply as CI/schema gate component

candidates.name: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-js

why_liked.claim: Node tracer provider is implemented as a package
Reference OpenTelemetry implementation for JS/TS

patterns: P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
avoid: SDK repo; focus on instrumentation patterns and config

candidates.name: temporalio/sdk-typescript

why_liked.claim: Durable workflow SDK for TypeScript
OpenTelemetry interceptors are provided as a separate package

patterns: P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
avoid: Adds infrastructure complexity; use for ingestion reliability only

candidates.name: cli/cli

why_liked.claim: Mature governance docs for project layout and releases
Security scanning workflow exists in CI

patterns: P-008 Release automation and versioned artifacts
avoid: Different language/runtime; use governance patterns only

candidates.name: inngest/inngest

why_liked.claim: Documents an OpenAPI workflow
Engineering docs for evolving APIs and architecture

avoid: Different language/runtime; extract docs and workflow patterns

patterns.name: P-001 Docs-as-interface
patterns.summary: Docs are treated as an interface: project layout, contributor rules, and playbooks are versioned with code.
tradeoffs: More docs to maintain; requires fast doc gates in CI

isa_mapping.change_outline: Add a small docs index entry for research packages and standardize a header block (date, sources, validator).
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Docs and examples must avoid console methods; use serverLogger or stdout/stderr write patterns only.

patterns.name: P-002 CI workflows as governance
patterns.summary: Granular CI workflows act as governance: separate checks for typecheck, migrations, docs, security, and releases.
tradeoffs: More workflows increase cognitive load; mitigate with naming conventions and CI docs index

isa_mapping.change_outline: Add small, scoped workflows per gate (docs policy, schema validation, no-console gate, deterministic artifacts).
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Gate scripts should fail via exit code and structured stderr output, not console methods.

patterns.name: P-003 Typed API boundary with tRPC + Zod
patterns.summary: Typed boundaries (tRPC + schema validation) reduce ambiguity and localize changes.
tradeoffs: Requires discipline around modular router composition and shared types

isa_mapping.change_outline: Split server routers into domain modules; require schema validation for DB-touching mutations.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: All error paths should use serverLogger and include trace id metadata.

patterns.name: P-004 Artifact-first APIs (OpenAPI specs)
patterns.summary: OpenAPI specs and examples are tracked as artifacts and evolve with explicit workflows.
tradeoffs: Specs can drift from implementation without automation

isa_mapping.change_outline: Where ISA emits JSON artifacts, add schemas and validate in CI; consider spec exports for non-tRPC consumers.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Validation scripts should report failures via exit codes and stderr only.

patterns.name: P-005 Schema validation in CI (AJV)
patterns.summary: JSON Schema validation (AJV) is a low-cost CI gate for generated artifacts and runtime contracts.
tradeoffs: Schemas need ownership; treat them as versioned contracts

isa_mapping.change_outline: Add schemas for new generated artifacts and validate them in CI using AJV.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Validators should be silent on success and print structured failure messages to stderr.

patterns.name: P-006 Tracing and metrics via OpenTelemetry
patterns.summary: OpenTelemetry provides a standard approach for traces and metrics across HTTP, DB, background work, and LLM calls.
tradeoffs: Requires exporter decisions (OTLP endpoint, sampling, PII policy)

isa_mapping.change_outline: Add spans around API requests, DB queries, ingestion jobs, and LLM calls; attach trace ids to serverLogger meta.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Use serverLogger for all runtime logging; never call console methods.

patterns.name: P-007 Durable workflows for reliability
patterns.summary: Durable workflows and explicit retry semantics make ingestion pipelines resilient and observable.
tradeoffs: Adds infrastructure complexity; best used for ingestion and scheduled jobs

isa_mapping.change_outline: Define idempotency keys per ingest item, persist provenance, and apply bounded retries with backoff.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Emit structured events via serverLogger and store failures in error ledger persistence.

patterns.name: P-008 Release automation and versioned artifacts
patterns.summary: Release automation makes artifact versioning explicit and reduces manual drift.
tradeoffs: Requires commit discipline and changelog conventions

isa_mapping.change_outline: Adopt predictable versioning for ISA artifacts (schemas, datasets, advisory format) and automate release notes.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Release scripts should fail via exit codes and use structured stderr output only.

patterns.name: P-009 Deterministic fixtures for eval and traces
patterns.summary: Small deterministic fixtures (trace samples, eval inputs) make regressions reproducible and support CI eval gates.
tradeoffs: Fixture curation takes time; keep them small and versioned

isa_mapping.change_outline: Add deterministic evaluation fixtures and a schema-validated evaluation report as a CI regression gate.
isa_mapping.no_console_strategy: Evaluation harness writes artifacts to disk and uses serverLogger only for structured errors.

action_plan.title: Enforce scoped no-console gate
action_plan.value: Prevents regressions and keeps logs routable through ISA logger facade
acceptance_criteria: CI fails if console\. appears under server/, client/, shared/, scripts/, docs/research/oss-benchmarks/2026-02-15/
Gate avoids scanning legacy .github text to prevent false positives
action_plan.no_console_compliance: All new code and docs use serverLogger or stdout/stderr write patterns only; no console methods.

action_plan.title: Modularize server routers into domain routers
action_plan.value: Reduces agent context and makes routing changes safer
acceptance_criteria: server/routers.ts becomes composition only
Each domain router has focused tests and schema-validated inputs for mutations
Existing route names remain backwards compatible
action_plan.no_console_compliance: All errors and diagnostics use serverLogger with trace ids.

action_plan.title: Trace id propagation and error ledger correlation
action_plan.value: Enables correlation across API, DB, ingestion, and LLM calls
acceptance_criteria: Every request has a trace id and it is attached to logs and error ledger rows
LLM invocation records and ingestion jobs include trace ids
No secrets are logged; only safe metadata
action_plan.no_console_compliance: Structured stderr/stdout writes only through logger facade; no console methods.

action_plan.title: Ingestion reliability: idempotency, provenance, retries
action_plan.value: Prevents duplicates and makes reprocessing safe and observable
action_plan.risk: High (touches data writes and scheduling semantics)
acceptance_criteria: Each ingest item has an idempotency key and is deduped at write boundary
Provenance stored: source URL, retrieval timestamp, content hash, parser version
Retries are bounded with backoff and failures are stored via error ledger
action_plan.no_console_compliance: Ingestion events are logged via serverLogger with trace ids.

action_plan.title: Add JSON schema and AJV validation for research artifacts
action_plan.value: Prevents silent drift in benchmarks.json and future research JSON
acceptance_criteria: benchmarks.json validates against a schema in CI
Required keys and array ordering rules are enforced
action_plan.no_console_compliance: Validators emit failures via exit codes and stderr only.

action_plan.title: Baseline OpenTelemetry instrumentation for ISA
action_plan.value: Unified tracing for API, DB, ingestion, and LLM calls
acceptance_criteria: Traces emitted in dev with local exporter
Production exporter configurable and secrets are excluded
action_plan.no_console_compliance: No instrumentation uses console methods; route logs via serverLogger.

action_plan.title: Deterministic RAG evaluation fixtures and schema
action_plan.value: Makes RAG quality measurable and reproducible
acceptance_criteria: Small fixture set runs in CI
Evaluation report is JSON and schema-validated
action_plan.no_console_compliance: Runner writes artifacts to disk and uses serverLogger for structured errors.

action_plan.title: Version and release ISA artifacts predictably
action_plan.value: Predictable versioning for consumers of ISA artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Define artifact versioning rules
Automate changelog generation and tagging
action_plan.no_console_compliance: Release scripts emit structured stderr on failure; no console usage.

action_plan.title: Ownership and review boundaries (CODEOWNERS)
action_plan.value: Govern high-risk changes via review requirements
acceptance_criteria: Critical folders require review by named owners

action_plan.title: CI index and naming convention doc
action_plan.value: Reduces mystery CI and improves onboarding
acceptance_criteria: Document each workflow and what it gates
Define naming conventions for workflows and scripts
action_plan.no_console_compliance: Docs avoid examples with console methods.

dimensions.description: SLO/error-budget alignment, retry/backoff, idempotency, and deterministic failure handling.
Dependency/security policy enforcement, authz boundaries, and secret hygiene.
Structured logging, traceability, and actionable telemetry coverage.
Lineage, source attribution, and reproducible dataset/version references.
Deterministic fixtures, benchmark repeatability, and quality signal governance.

copyable_practices: Attach trace identifiers to every model invocation and retrieval step.
Use typed API boundary contracts for evaluator and caller surfaces.
minimum_implementation_set: Create capability-scoped Ask ISA eval fixtures and expected outputs.
Persist RAG trace quality metrics with deterministic schema validation.
Add CI gate that replays fixture queries and verifies stable scoring.

copyable_practices: Use bounded retries + idempotency keys for ingestion jobs.
Publish pipeline observability artifacts per CI run.
Separate migration/operational checks into dedicated workflows.
minimum_implementation_set: Define idempotency key contract for news ingestion write paths.
Emit ingestion run artifact with source coverage and failure taxonomy.
Gate ingestion reliability against deterministic retry and timeout policy.

copyable_practices: Enforce strict schema validation at ingest-to-embedding boundary.
Track provenance and verification timestamps as first-class fields.
Use deterministic fixture traces for retrieval quality regressions.
minimum_implementation_set: Add schema checks for chunk/provenance writes in ingestion pipeline.
Require provenance fields in all knowledge import paths.
Add fixture-backed retrieval quality tests for citation admin surface.

copyable_practices: Validate generated catalog contracts against JSON schema in CI.
Keep typed table ownership contracts explicit and queryable.
Treat dataset documentation as interface with strict index hygiene.
minimum_implementation_set: Expand table ownership mapping to cover all schema tables.
Add CI check for schema-to-manifest table ownership completeness.
Define canonical dataset artifact schema and validation gate.

copyable_practices: Publish typed mapping contracts for confidence-bearing outputs.
Instrument mapping calls with traceable confidence markers.
Use deterministic benchmark prompts for mapping quality checks.
minimum_implementation_set: Add fixed mapping evaluation fixtures with expected confidence tiers.
Capture mapping trace metadata in structured logs/artifacts.
Bind mapping API outputs to schema-validated contract snapshots.

copyable_practices: Version advisory outputs and automate release-note style diffs.
Treat advisory artifacts as immutable, auditable release outputs.
Use explicit contributor/review playbooks for report updates.
minimum_implementation_set: Add advisory artifact versioning policy with deterministic diff generation.
Add CI check for advisory schema + change-log completeness.
Link advisory release metadata to capability manifest evidence pointers.
